articleplaceholder-desc: Waxay bixisaa bog gaar ah oo leh macluumaad ku saabsan {{WBREPONAME}} oo ku saabsan mawduuc gaar ah, iyadoo lagu dhiirigelinayo in maqaal laga sameeyo mawduucaas

articleplaceholder-createpage-alreadyexi: Bogga leh cinwaanka $1 hore ayuu u jiraa. Fadlan dooro mid kale.

articleplaceholder-abouttopic-topmessage:
Tani waa aragti toos ah oo ku saleysan [$1 xog ka timid {{WBREPONAME}}].
Maqaal dhammaystiran weli ma jiro, laakiin waad ka caawin kartaa abuuristiisa.
